This is what YUMPU makes possible:
- Reach out to new audiences worldwide – thanks to better Google indexing, your PDF publications will become even more visible and receive thousands of free prospects as soon as you publish your ePaper.
- Turn your valuable static PDFs into vibrant online catalogs, magazines or Flipbooks that Google really loves and rewards with lots of free prospects.
- Easily embed your ePaper publications on your website or link up to them instead of PDFs. Or you can boost your ePaper on social media – with just one click.
- With the integration of videos, audio files or other interactive elements you can turn your ePaper into a multimedia star.

These and many more functions are already available to you at no cost in the free version

Thank you for choosing YUMPU.
